base_url.description: KYVE Cosmos-style REST query endpoint base URL. No credentials required; defaults to the public KYVE Korellia network endpoint.

page_size.description: Records per page (1-1000), sent as the pagination.limit query parameter.

max_pages.description: Maximum pages to read; use 0, all, or unlimited to exhaust the stream.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
